title: 공지 동국대이주다문화통합연구소 제6차 IMI 국제학술대회 발표자 모집 안내 (~2.13)
content_text:
From Boundaries to Bridges:
Multicultural Education and the Making of Global Citizens
The 6th IMI Annual International Conference
Friday May 22nd, 2026 (Online)
The organizing committee of the Institute for Multicultural Integration at Dongguk University, Seoul, Korea, invites scholars, researchers, educators, and practitioners to submit proposals for the international conference
“From Boundaries to Bridges: Multicultural Education and the Making of Global Citizens”
funded by the National Research Foundation of Korea. This conference aims to foster dialogue on the evolving landscape of multicultural education, with a focus on how educational systems can cultivate global citizenship, intercultural competence, and
more
inclusive social futures.
Across
Asia
, increasing linguistic, cultural, and ethnic diversity continues to reshape educational practices and policy priorities. In this context, bridging boundaries—between cultures, communities, identities, and nations—has become an essential task for educators. This conference seeks to explore innovative, context-responsive approaches that promote harmony, equity, and global citizenship through multicultural and intercultural education.
Areas of Interest
We welcome proposals that address, but are not limited to, the following themes:
·
Multicultural and intercultural education policies
across Asia
and
beyond
·
Culture and regional studies based in Korea and other regions
·
Curriculum, pedagogy, and professional development for culturally and linguistically diverse classrooms
·
Assessment of intercultural and global citizenship competencies, student agency, and civic engagement
·
Social justice and DEI perspectives in multicultural and global citizenship education (GCE)
·
Migration, diaspora communities, and youth identity formation
·
Sustainability education addressing climate change and ecological justice
·
Digital learning, OER, and equitable educational practices in multicultural/GCE contexts
·
Comparative studies of multicultural education and GCE across
Asian
and
other international
settings
·
Community-based education and partnerships promoting Indigenous and local knowledge, languages, and cultural practices
Deadlines
·
Abstract submission:
February 13, 2026
·
Notification of acceptance:
February 27, 2026
·
Full paper submission:
April 17, 2026
Submission Requirements
·
Submit all materials via email to
imi2013@dgu.ac.kr
.
·
Abstract:
250–300 words in English
·
Conference paper:
10 pages, including references
**Download the forms at
https://imi.dongguk.edu/imi5_1/89
Presenter Information
·
Presentation length:
20 minutes
·
Language:
English
·
Honorarium:
KRW
3
00,000
(international transfer fee included)
·
Publication opportunity:
Presenters will be invited to submit their full papers to a special issue of the IMI journal
Diversity
. An additional honorarium of KRW 100,000 will be provided upon publication (international transfer fee included).

:
다문화교육과 세계시민성 함양
(From Boundaries to Bridges: Multicultural Education and the Making of Global Citizens)
”을 주제로 열리는 국제학술대회에 학자
,
연구자
,
교육자 및 실천가 여러분의 발표 제안을 요청드립니다
.
본 학술대회는 다문화교육의 변화하는 지형에 대해 논의하고
,
교육 제도가 어떻게 세계시민성
,
상호문화 역량
,
그리고 포용적 미래 사회를 구축할 수 있는지에 초점을 둡니다
.
아시아 전역에서 언어적·문화적·민족적 다양성이 증가함에 따라 교육 실천과 정책의 우선순위가 재편되고 있습니다
.
이러한 맥락에서 문화
,
공동체
,
정체성
,
국가 간의 경계를 잇는 일은 교육자들에게 중요한 과제 가운데 하나가 되었습니다
.
본 학술대회는 다문화·상호문화 교육을 통해 조화
,
형평성
,
세계시민성을 증진하는 혁신적이고 맥락 친화적인 접근들을 탐색하고자 합니다
.

,
교수·학습
,
교사 전문성 개발
·
상호문화 역량과 세계시민성 역량
,

·
다문화교육 및 세계시민교육에서의 사회정의와 다양성·형평성·포용
(DEI)
관점

,

·

OER(

,

content_html:
From Boundaries to Bridges: Multicultural Education and the Making of Global Citizens

 

The 6th IMI Annual International Conference

Friday May 22nd, 2026 (Online)

 

The organizing committee of the Institute for Multicultural Integration at Dongguk University, Seoul, Korea, invites scholars, researchers, educators, and practitioners to submit proposals for the international conference “From Boundaries to Bridges: Multicultural Education and the Making of Global Citizens” funded by the National Research Foundation of Korea. This conference aims to foster dialogue on the evolving landscape of multicultural education, with a focus on how educational systems can cultivate global citizenship, intercultural competence, and more inclusive social futures.

 

Across Asia, increasing linguistic, cultural, and ethnic diversity continues to reshape educational practices and policy priorities. In this context, bridging boundaries—between cultures, communities, identities, and nations—has become an essential task for educators. This conference seeks to explore innovative, context-responsive approaches that promote harmony, equity, and global citizenship through multicultural and intercultural education.

 

Areas of Interest

We welcome proposals that address, but are not limited to, the following themes:

 

·         Multicultural and intercultural education policies across Asia and beyond

·        Culture and regional studies based in Korea and other regions 

·         Curriculum, pedagogy, and professional development for culturally and linguistically diverse classrooms

·         Assessment of intercultural and global citizenship competencies, student agency, and civic engagement

·         Social justice and DEI perspectives in multicultural and global citizenship education (GCE)

·         Migration, diaspora communities, and youth identity formation

·         Sustainability education addressing climate change and ecological justice

·         Digital learning, OER, and equitable educational practices in multicultural/GCE contexts

·         Comparative studies of multicultural education and GCE across Asian and other international settings

·         Community-based education and partnerships promoting Indigenous and local knowledge, languages, and cultural practices

 

Deadlines

 

·         Abstract submission: February 13, 2026

·         Notification of acceptance: February 27, 2026

·         Full paper submission: April 17, 2026

 

Submission Requirements

 

·         Submit all materials via email to imi2013@dgu.ac.kr.

·         Abstract: 250–300 words in English

·         Conference paper: 10 pages, including references

       **Download the forms at https://imi.dongguk.edu/imi5_1/89

 

Presenter Information

 

·         Presentation length: 20 minutes

·         Language: English

·         Honorarium: KRW 300,000 (international transfer fee included)

·         Publication opportunity: Presenters will be invited to submit their full papers to a special issue of the IMI journal Diversity. An additional honorarium of KRW 100,000 will be provided upon publication (international transfer fee included).

 

 

경계를 넘어 연결로: 다문화교육과 세계시민성 함양

제6회 IMI 연례 국제학술대회
2026년 5월 22일(금), 온라인 개최

 

 

동국대 이주다문화연구소 국제학술대회 조직위원회는 “경계를 넘어 연결로: 다문화교육과 세계시민성 함양(From Boundaries to Bridges: Multicultural Education and the Making of Global Citizens)”을 주제로 열리는 국제학술대회에 학자, 연구자, 교육자 및 실천가 여러분의 발표 제안을 요청드립니다. 본 학술대회는 다문화교육의 변화하는 지형에 대해 논의하고, 교육 제도가 어떻게 세계시민성, 상호문화 역량, 그리고 포용적 미래 사회를 구축할 수 있는지에 초점을 둡니다.

 

아시아 전역에서 언어적·문화적·민족적 다양성이 증가함에 따라 교육 실천과 정책의 우선순위가 재편되고 있습니다. 이러한 맥락에서 문화, 공동체, 정체성, 국가 간의 경계를 잇는 일은 교육자들에게 중요한 과제 가운데 하나가 되었습니다. 본 학술대회는 다문화·상호문화 교육을 통해 조화, 형평성, 세계시민성을 증진하는 혁신적이고 맥락 친화적인 접근들을 탐색하고자 합니다.

 

관심 분야

 

·         아시아 및 그 밖의 지역에서의 다문화·상호문화 교육 정책

·         한국 및 타지역 문화, 지역학 관련 주제

·         문화적·언어적 다양성을 지닌 학급을 위한 교육과정, 교수·학습, 교사 전문성 개발

·         상호문화 역량과 세계시민성 역량, 학습자 주체성과 시민 참여에 대한 평가

·         다문화교육 및 세계시민교육에서의 사회정의와 다양성·형평성·포용(DEI) 관점

·         이주, 디아스포라 공동체, 청소년 정체성 형성

·         기후위기와 생태정의를 다루는 지속가능발전교육

·         다문화 및 세계시민교육 맥락에서의 디지털 학습과 OER(공개 교육 자료) 기반의 교육 형평성 실천

·         아시아 및 기타 국제적 맥락에서의 다문화교육과 세계시민교육 비교 연구

·         지역사회 기반 교육 및 파트너십을 통한 지역 고유 지식, 언어, 문화 실천의 강화

 

주요 일정

·         초록 제출 마감: 2026년 2월 13일

·         심사 결과 발표: 2026년 2월 27일

·         발표문 제출 마감: 2026년 4월 17일

 

제출 안내

 

·         모든 제출물은 이메일(imi2013@dgu.ac.kr)로 보내주시기 바랍니다.

·         초록: 영어 250–300단어

·         발표문: 참고문헌을 포함하여 A4 기준 10쪽 

        **문서 양식 다운로드: https://imi.dongguk.edu/imi5_1/89

 

발표 정보

 

·         발표 시간: 20분

·         발표 언어: 영어

·         사례비: 300,000원 (국제 송금 수수료 포함)

·         출판 기회: 발표자는 IMI 학술지 Diversity 특별호에 전체 논문을 투고할 수 있는 기회를 갖게 되며, 게재 시 추가 사례비 100,000원이 지급됩니다 (국제 송금 수수료 포함).
